articles.title: KD says loss to Lakers on him: 'I'm the offense'
articles.original_title: KD says loss to Lakers on him: 'I'm the offense'
articles.summary: The Lakers, in the process of carving out a defensive identity, threw a steady diet of double-teams at Kevin Durant in the fourth quarter Monday, leading to disastrous results for Houston. "I just felt like I lost the game for us tonight," said Durant.

articles.summary: Phoenix Suns owner Mat Ishbia and two Suns minority owners are heading to a confidential binding mediation that could result in Ishbia buying out the minority owners' 13% stake in the team.

articles.original_title: Clips' Leonard (ankle) sits vs. Spurs, is day-to-day

articles.title: Kerr part of Oscar win for documentary short

articles.title: South Africa wins the toss, fields in the 2nd cricket T20 against New Zealand
articles.original_title: South Africa wins the toss, fields in the 2nd cricket T20 against New Zealand
articles.summary: HAMILTON, New Zealand (AP) — South Africa won the toss and elected to field Tuesday in the second Twenty20 cricket international against New Zealand at Seddon Park.The Proteas lead the five-match series 1-0 after winning the first match by seven wickets on a low-scoring pitch at Mount Maunganui.Allrounder Wiaan Mulder has replaced Jordan Hermann in the South Africa lineup.New Zealand has made two changes, drafting in osh Clarkson and Lockie Ferguson in place of Bevon Jacobs and Zak Foulkes. Jaco
